title: solenostemon verschaffeltii
intro: Solenostemon verschaffeltii, commonly known as Coleus or Flame Nettle, is a species of flowering plant in the family Lamiaceae, native to tropical Africa and Asia. The leaves of this plant have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties that can help to soothe and calm skin irritations, wounds, and infections. The health benefits of Solenostemon verschaffeltii include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. In herbal preparations, the leaves can be made into a tea or infused oil to be used topically or internally, and are also used in traditional remedies for fever, sore throats, and respiratory issues.
